THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRIFFIN, SHOSHI AKA SHOSHI MORIAH GRIFFIN $8,034.25 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,034.25, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY TO PLTF. IN THE SUM OF $250 PER MONTH,OR MORE, COMMENCING ON 11/15/00 UNTIL PAID IN FULL. IF DEFT. MAKES PAYMENTS OF $250 PER MONTH ON TIME, FOR A TOTAL OF $5112 PAID ON A TIMELY BASIS, THEN PLTF. WILL WAIVE ANY AND ALL SUMS DUE & OWING OVER & ABOVE THE SUM OF $5112, SEE JUMT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
